item.description: Iran said it struck U.S. linked targets in response to U.S. strikes on Iranian missile and drone storage locations. The newest exchange of fire raises questions about President Trump’s Memorandum of Understanding with Iran. Iran’s foreign minister has accused the U.S. of “treaty breaking.” NBC News’ Keir Simmons has the latest.

media:content.media:title: Trump’s deal to end war in question after Iran retaliates to US strikes
media:content.media:description: Iran said it struck U.S. linked targets in response to U.S. strikes on Iranian missile and drone storage locations. The newest exchange of fire raises questions about President Trump’s Memorandum of Understanding with Iran. Iran’s foreign minister has accused the U.S. of “treaty breaking.” NBC News’ Keir Simmons has the latest.

item.title: Trump’s deal to end war in question after Iran retaliates to US strikes

item.description: La "Tricolor" le jugó de tú a tú a la Selección de CR7 en Miami y avanza a la siguiente fase como primero con siete puntos, por lo que se medirá ante Ghana; mientras los europeos quedan segundos con cinco y afrontarán la llave más difícil ante Croacia.

media:content.media:title: ¡Colombia avanza como líder! Le jugó sin miedo a Portugal y sale invita de Miami rumbo a 16vos
media:content.media:description: La "Tricolor" le jugó de tú a tú a la Selección de CR7 en Miami y avanza a la siguiente fase como primero con siete puntos, por lo que se medirá ante Ghana; mientras los europeos quedan segundos con cinco y afrontarán la llave más difícil ante Croacia.

item.title: ¡Colombia avanza como líder! Le jugó sin miedo a Portugal y sale invita de Miami rumbo a 16vos

item.description: Giuliano Simeone se emocionó tras vivir una experiencia inolvidable con Argentina y recordó el apoyo de su familia y amigos. El delantero aseguró que siempre quiso hacer su propio camino y ya piensa en el duelo ante Cabo Verde.

media:content.media:title: Giuliano Simeone: “Llegar a un Mundial es lo que sueña cualquier jugador”
media:content.media:description: Giuliano Simeone se emocionó tras vivir una experiencia inolvidable con Argentina y recordó el apoyo de su familia y amigos. El delantero aseguró que siempre quiso hacer su propio camino y ya piensa en el duelo ante Cabo Verde.

item.title: Giuliano Simeone: “Llegar a un Mundial es lo que sueña cualquier jugador”

item.description: La selección asiática filtró la zaga argentina con un centro rasante y Al-Tamari se barró en el área para conectar con la zurda y vencer al "Dibu" Martínez, metiéndose a la pelea ante el Campeón del mundo en en último duelo de Fase de Grupos.

media:content.media:title: ¡Sorprenden a Argentina! Gol de Mousa Al-Tamari acorta distancias para Jordania en Dallas
media:content.media:description: La selección asiática filtró la zaga argentina con un centro rasante y Al-Tamari se barró en el área para conectar con la zurda y vencer al "Dibu" Martínez, metiéndose a la pelea ante el Campeón del mundo en en último duelo de Fase de Grupos.

item.title: ¡Sorprenden a Argentina! Gol de Mousa Al-Tamari acorta distancias para Jordania en Dallas

item.description: Lautaro Martínez aseguró que Argentina afrontó con máxima seriedad el duelo ante Jordania por la historia de la selección. El delantero celebró el triunfo, el debut de varios compañeros y ya puso la mira en Cabo Verde.

media:content.media:title: Lautaro: “La historia de Argentina obliga a competir siempre”
media:content.media:description: Lautaro Martínez aseguró que Argentina afrontó con máxima seriedad el duelo ante Jordania por la historia de la selección. El delantero celebró el triunfo, el debut de varios compañeros y ya puso la mira en Cabo Verde.

item.title: Lautaro: “La historia de Argentina obliga a competir siempre”

item.description: Giovani Lo Celso confesó que anotar su primer gol en un Mundial fue un momento inolvidable. El mediocampista reveló que Scaloni le dijo que su oportunidad llegaría y destacó la felicidad que vive el grupo argentino.

media:content.media:title: Lo Celso: “Marcar en un Mundial es inolvidable”
media:content.media:description: Giovani Lo Celso confesó que anotar su primer gol en un Mundial fue un momento inolvidable. El mediocampista reveló que Scaloni le dijo que su oportunidad llegaría y destacó la felicidad que vive el grupo argentino.

item.title: Lo Celso: “Marcar en un Mundial es inolvidable”

item.description: Lionel Scaloni destacó la rotación en el triunfo 3-1 sobre Jordania y valoró que varios jugadores sumaran sus primeros minutos en el Mundial. El DT también explicó que decidió cuidar a algunos titulares y ya piensa en Cabo Verde.

media:content.media:title: Scaloni: “Era importante que todos tuvieran minutos”
media:content.media:description: Lionel Scaloni destacó la rotación en el triunfo 3-1 sobre Jordania y valoró que varios jugadores sumaran sus primeros minutos en el Mundial. El DT también explicó que decidió cuidar a algunos titulares y ya piensa en Cabo Verde.

item.title: Scaloni: “Era importante que todos tuvieran minutos”

item.description: Nadie podía creerlo. Sasa Kalajdzic remató en el área chica en el último segundo del partido y logró el 3-3 para Austria ante Argelia, logrando un empate que les da el boleto a la siguiente ronda del Mundial.

media:content.media:title: Austria lo empató en el último segundo; gol de Kalajdzic les da el boleto a 16vos
media:content.media:description: Nadie podía creerlo. Sasa Kalajdzic remató en el área chica en el último segundo del partido y logró el 3-3 para Austria ante Argelia, logrando un empate que les da el boleto a la siguiente ronda del Mundial.

item.title: Austria lo empató en el último segundo; gol de Kalajdzic les da el boleto a 16vos

item.description: ¡Increíble! Argelia logra el 3-2 en los últimos momentos del partido y, con este resultado, estaría eliminando a Austria de la Copa del Mundo.

media:content.media:title: ¡Doblete! Mahrez desata la locura con un gol en el último minuto
media:content.media:description: ¡Increíble! Argelia logra el 3-2 en los últimos momentos del partido y, con este resultado, estaría eliminando a Austria de la Copa del Mundo.

item.title: ¡Doblete! Mahrez desata la locura con un gol en el último minuto

item.description: El astro rosarino recibió una falta fuera del área, él mismo cobró el tiro libre y encontró el espacio entre la barrera para colar un fino zurdazo casi al centro del arco sin que el arquero jordano pudiera reaccionar, sumando su sexto gol en esta Copa.

media:content.media:title: ¡Golazo de Messi! El 10 firma otra genialidad de tiro libre con Argentina y suma seis en el Mundial
media:content.media:description: El astro rosarino recibió una falta fuera del área, él mismo cobró el tiro libre y encontró el espacio entre la barrera para colar un fino zurdazo casi al centro del arco sin que el arquero jordano pudiera reaccionar, sumando su sexto gol en esta Copa.

item.title: ¡Golazo de Messi! El 10 firma otra genialidad de tiro libre con Argentina y suma seis en el Mundial

item.description: El extremo de 35 años es uno de los jugadores más importantes de Argelia y logró hacerse presente en el marcador con un disparo de zurda. Con el empate, tanto Austria como Argelia avanzan a la ronda de 16vos.

media:content.media:title: Riyad Mahrez aparece y logra el empate para Argelia contra Austria
media:content.media:description: El extremo de 35 años es uno de los jugadores más importantes de Argelia y logró hacerse presente en el marcador con un disparo de zurda. Con el empate, tanto Austria como Argelia avanzan a la ronda de 16vos.

item.title: Riyad Mahrez aparece y logra el empate para Argelia contra Austria

item.description: Uno de los mejores jugadores de Austria apareció de frente a portería para rematar de primera intención y poner el 2-1 sobre Argelia, anotando el gol que los asegura como segundo lugar de grupo, solo por detrás de Argentina.

media:content.media:title: Marcel Sabitzer le regresa la ventaja a Austria con un derechazo ante Argelia
media:content.media:description: Uno de los mejores jugadores de Austria apareció de frente a portería para rematar de primera intención y poner el 2-1 sobre Argelia, anotando el gol que los asegura como segundo lugar de grupo, solo por detrás de Argentina.

item.title: Marcel Sabitzer le regresa la ventaja a Austria con un derechazo ante Argelia

item.description: Another earthquake shook Venezuela today, as families continue searching for missing loved ones three days after twin quakes rocked that country. Ana Vanessa Herrero reports from Caracas for NBC News.

media:content.media:title: Another earthquake felt in Venezuela as families search for missing loved ones
media:content.media:description: Another earthquake shook Venezuela today, as families continue searching for missing loved ones three days after twin quakes rocked that country. Ana Vanessa Herrero reports from Caracas for NBC News.

item.title: Another earthquake felt in Venezuela as families search for missing loved ones

item.dc:creator: Bridget Bowman
item.description: Rep. Julia Letlow won the Republican primary runoff for Senate in Louisiana, NBC News projects, defeating state Treasurer John Fleming in another victory for President Donald Trump’s slate of preferred candidates

media:content.media:text: Letlow Goes To Louisiana Republican Senate Runoff
media:content.media:description: Representative Julia Letlow, a Republican from Louisiana and Senate candidate, during a news conference at in Metairie, La. on May 18.

item.title: Trump-backed Rep. Julia Letlow wins Louisiana Senate primary runoff

item.description: Officials confirmed at least one person died during a flash flood emergency in Kentucky on Saturday. At the same time, fast-moving wildfires burned out of control in Utah, prompting evacuations. NBC News’ Dana Griffin reports.

media:content.media:title: Dangerous fire, flood conditions prompt states of emergency
media:content.media:description: Officials confirmed at least one person died during a flash flood emergency in Kentucky on Saturday. At the same time, fast-moving wildfires burned out of control in Utah, prompting evacuations. NBC News’ Dana Griffin reports.

item.title: Dangerous fire, flood conditions prompt states of emergency

item.dc:creator: Aria Bendix
item.description: Dangerous fire conditions in the Southwest are threatening to worsen blazes in Utah, Nevada and New Mexico, putting many communities on high alert this weekend

media:content.media:text: A firefighting helicopter flies over the mountain landscape near Piute Reservoir.
media:content.media:description: A firefighting helicopter flies over the mountain landscape near Piute Reservoir while responding to the fast-moving Cottonwood Fire on June 25.

item.title: Wildfires rage across the Southwest as officials warn of ‘extremely critical’ conditions

item.dc:creator: Bracey Harris
item.description: Before the outcry, before the demands for justice, before he was placed inside a small casket with a stuffed Bluey, a family had looked forward to sharing simple moments with Kohen Wiley, who was just months away from his second birthday and named by his maternal grandma.

media:content.media:text: A memorial with balloons and stuffed animals in front of a Walmart.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:text: A memorial with stuffed animals in front of a Walmart.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:text: A triptych image from a funeral in Mississippi.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:text: A group of people standing in the shade of tall trees in front of a brick building.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:text: A man, seen from the neck down, with his arms around his two sons.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:text: A steel water tower appears behind a highway road sign at dusk.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:text: Warm light falls across an asphalt parking lot at sunset.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

item.title: Family of 1-year-old boy fatally shot by Mississippi police say goodbye, as questions remain

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: Amazon Prime Day 2026 may be over, but some of the deals aren’t. Here are the best sales still live, including Medicube, Oura Ring, Apple and more editor favorites.

media:content.media:text: Amazon Prime Day officially ended on June 26, but some brands are extending their deals through the weekend for last-minute shoppers.
media:content.media:description: Amazon Prime Day officially ended on June 26, but some brands are extending their deals through the weekend for last-minute shoppers.

media:content.media:text: Amazon Prime Day officially ended on June 26, but some brands are extending their deals through the weekend for last-minute shoppers.
media:content.media:description: Amazon Prime Day officially ended on June 26, but some brands are extending their deals through the weekend for last-minute shoppers.

item.title: Amazon Prime Day is over, but I found 131+ deals still available — shop before you miss them

item.description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

media:content.media:title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft
media:content.media:description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

item.title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft

item.dc:creator: Bracey Harris
item.description: Before the outcry, before the demands for justice, before he was placed inside a small casket with a stuffed Bluey, a family had looked forward to sharing simple moments with Kohen Wiley, who was just months away from his second birthday and named by his maternal grandma.

media:content.media:text: A memorial with balloons and stuffed animals in front of a Walmart.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:text: A memorial with stuffed animals in front of a Walmart.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:text: A man, seen from the neck down, with his arms around his two sons.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

media:content.media:text: A steel water tower appears behind a highway road sign at dusk.
media:content.media:description: A makeshift memorial for Kohen Wiley, a 1-year-old boy killed earlier this month in an officer-involved shooting outside a Walmart, in Senatobia, Miss. on Friday.

item.dc:creator: Bridget Bowman
item.description: Rep. Julia Letlow won the Republican primary runoff for Senate in Louisiana, NBC News projects, defeating state Treasurer John Fleming in another victory for President Donald Trump’s slate of preferred candidates

media:content.media:text: Letlow Goes To Louisiana Republican Senate Runoff
media:content.media:description: Representative Julia Letlow, a Republican from Louisiana and Senate candidate, during a news conference at in Metairie, La. on May 18.

item.title: Trump-backed Rep. Julia Letlow wins Louisiana Senate primary runoff

item.dc:creator: Aria Bendix
Samantha Cookinham
item.description: At least three people have died in flash floods caused by heavy rain and multiple thunderstorms in Kentucky, officials said, a severe weather event that prompted Gov.

media:content.media:text: A line of vehicles driving through floodwater.
media:content.media:description: Drivers maneuver their vehicles through high water flooding West Parrish Avenue after a heavy rainfallin Owensboro, Ky. on June 27, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Submerged cars at an intersection with red lights.
media:content.media:description: Street flooding in Richmond, Ky. on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: Andy Beshear speaking in front of an array of microphones.
media:content.media:description: Gov. Andy Beshear warned Kentucky residents in a video message not to drive after dark, adding that a motorist was swept away and killed by the floods.

item.title: Kentucky flash floods kill at least 3 people with rescue operations ongoing

item.dc:creator: Kyla Guilfoil
Julia Ainsley
Julie Tsirkin
Laura Strickler
item.description: President Donald Trump announced Saturday that he nominated Lance Schroyer, a former Oklahoma state trooper, to take over as director of Immigration and Customs Enforcement.“I am very pleased to announce that I have nominated Lance Schroyer to be our next ICE Director,” Trump wrote in a Truth Social post.

media:content.media:text: An ICE patch and badge on an officer in Minneapolis.
media:content.media:description: Schroyer currently serves as the senior advisor to the Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin,

item.title: Trump says he is nominating former Oklahoma state trooper Lance Schroyer to be ICE director

item.dc:creator: Aria Bendix
item.description: Dangerous fire conditions in the Southwest are threatening to worsen blazes in Utah, Nevada and New Mexico, putting many communities on high alert this weekend

media:content.media:text: A firefighting helicopter flies over the mountain landscape near Piute Reservoir.
media:content.media:description: A firefighting helicopter flies over the mountain landscape near Piute Reservoir while responding to the fast-moving Cottonwood Fire on June 25.

item.title: Wildfires rage across the Southwest as officials warn of ‘extremely critical’ conditions

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
Marlene Lenthang
item.description: The increasingly desperate search for survivors i n Venezuela entered a third day Saturday as people dug through the rubble of collapsed homes and apartment buildings after the devastating one-two punch of 7.2 and 7.5 magnitude earthquakes, knowing time is running out.

media:content.media:text: Rescue workers.
media:content.media:description: Rescue workers search through the rubble three days after earthquakes struck La Guaira, Venezuela, on June 27.

media:content.media:text: Aerial view of La Guaira.
media:content.media:description: Rescue workers search through the rubble three days after earthquakes struck La Guaira, Venezuela, on June 27.

media:content.media:text: People distribute aid.
media:content.media:description: Rescue workers search through the rubble three days after earthquakes struck La Guaira, Venezuela, on June 27.

media:content.media:text: A collapsed building
media:content.media:description: Rescue workers search through the rubble three days after earthquakes struck La Guaira, Venezuela, on June 27.

item.title: Venezuela earthquake death toll rises above 1,400
